message.content:
@startuml
participant File as File
participant LexicalAnalysisDriver as LexicalAnalysisDriver
participant LexicalAnalysisJava as LexicalAnalysisJava
participant JavaSyntaxLib as JavaSyntaxLib
participant TypeCheck as TypeCheck
participant ColorCode as ColorCode
participant ErrorCheck as ErrorCheck

File ->> LexicalAnalysisDriver : invokes
LexicalAnalysisDriver ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Calls
LexicalAnalysisJava ->> JavaSyntaxLib : Calls
JavaSyntaxLib ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Return(TypeCheck)
LexicalAnalysisJava ->> TypeCheck : SyntaxTypeCheck()
TypeCheck ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Return(TypeCheck)
LexicalAnalysisJava ->> ColorCode : SyntaxColorCheck()
ColorCode ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Return(ColorCode)
LexicalAnalysisJava ->> ErrorCheck : SyntaxErrorCheck()
ErrorCheck ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Return(Error Message)

alt [successful case]
    File ->> LexicalAnalysisJava : Error Free
else [Error Case]
    LexicalAnalysisJava ->> ErrorCheck : Return Error Message
end

@enduml
